name: Joy Riley
ai_summary: Joy Riley is an experienced educator with a substitute teaching certificate and business management degree who has taught students from newborns through 12th grade and is currently working as a nanny seeking a PT classroom role. Located in Gilbert, AZ with willingness to travel, she demonstrates gentle conflict resolution strategies and a clear passion for working with young children.

transcripts.q3:
A little about myself. My name is Joy Riley. Previously, Joy Miller, before my marriage, I have a degree in business management and have lived in Gilbert. Most of my life, I went to the schools here and I decided to become a teacher. My degree is in business management but I've taught anywhere from newborn all the way up to 12th grade and Beyond.
 Currently a nanny and looking to make a move I would like to find something that I would enjoy. And I believe I would really enjoy working at these classrooms.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in the Gilbert east Mesa area, but I will travel to Queen Creek, Apache Junction, Gold, Canyon Mesa Gilbert Chandler, Scottsdale Tempe, and so there is a phoenix
transcripts.q5: I'm interested in a part-time position.
transcripts.q6: If I went to need some other student, I would separate them. I'd make sure to come for the student that got hurt and check on them. Once both students and calm down, we would sit and talk as much as we could. At least with the young ones, we would explain how we use our gentle hands. We do not hurt our friends and then we would give our patent apology.
transcripts.q7:
Are you think I'd be a great teacher? I currently have a substitute teaching certificate and degree in business management. I've taught anywhere from newborns to adults, extensive teaching experience and as a nanny and I really enjoy the young kid, especially, young 324 age groups. It just so, what? But I would love to teach any age or
 take care of them, please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks.
